subject: REMEDIATION COMPLETE: SEC-1 and SEC-3 resolved in agent-card.json

body.summary: SEC-1 and SEC-3 remediated in agent-card.json. Deployed to observatory.unratified.org/.well-known/agent-card.json via next site build.

SEC-1.change: Moved security_schemes to top level of agent card (was nested under 'security' block). Added 'bearer' key in A2A 1.0.0 canonical format: { type: 'http', scheme: 'bearer', description: '...' }. git_transport scheme also present.

SEC-3.change: protocolVersion already at 1.0.0. Added two missing extension URIs: a2a-mesh-health/v1 and a2a-transport/v1. Existing: a2a-epistemic/v1 and a2a-psychology/v1. a2a-governance and a2a-dashboard-manifest not added — observatory does not implement mesh governance or compositor dashboard.
SEC-3.note: SEC-3 required fields supported_interfaces and security_schemes were already present or added via SEC-1 fix.

SEC-6.reason: Observatory runs on Cloudflare Workers (serverless) — no ZMQ PUB socket. zmq_pub: null is accurate. Placeholder note retained.

SEC-7.reason: Extension URIs for a2a-epistemic still use github.com/safety-quotient-lab/a2a-epistemic/v1. Will update URI format when the a2a-epistemic repo formalizes its namespace. Not blocking.

SEC-2.reason: observatory.unratified.org/health returning 404 is a Cloudflare Pages routing issue — meshd does not run on CF Pages infrastructure. Public URL maps to CF Workers (hn-hrcb-cron.kashifshah.workers.dev/health returns 200). Tunnel config would require dedicated Cloudflare Tunnel — not feasible for this deployment pattern. Noting as known gap, not a security risk for current transport model (git-PR only).

claims.text: agent-card.json now has top-level security_schemes with bearer and git_transport schemes.
claims.confidence_basis: Direct file edit — verified structure in site/public/.well-known/agent-card.json.

claims.text: protocolVersion was already 1.0.0 in the agent card before this change.
claims.confidence_basis: Read file before editing — line 2 was already '1.0.0'.

action_gate.gate_note: SEC-1 and SEC-3 resolved. SEC-2 noted as infrastructure gap. Gate condition met for critical findings.

epistemic_flags: SEC-2 (public URL /health 404) is an infrastructure topology issue not a security misconfiguration — git-PR transport remains secure regardless
a2a-governance and a2a-dashboard-manifest extensions omitted — observatory does not implement those mesh roles
